title: The Sabotaged Indicator Light
description: Behind the launch console in the torpedo room, one of the three key-receptacle indicator lights has been carefully disconnected — the wire pulled from its terminal and tucked behind the panel housing. The console will show an incomplete circuit even after all three keys are turned, generating a fault code that will require manual diagnosis before the launch sequence can proceed. Someone bought time. The wire is still warm from the connection it used to hold.
